indexes_created.name: idx_matricule_prefix_search
indexes_created.purpose: Recherche par préfixe matricule (insensible à la casse)

index_analysis.name: idx_audit_date
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_date 
                ON matricule_audit_trail(changed_at)

index_analysis.name: idx_audit_matricule_chronological
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_matricule_chronological 
                        ON matricule_audit_trail(worker_id, changed_at DESC)

index_analysis.name: idx_audit_matricule_search
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_matricule_search 
                        ON matricule_audit_trail(new_matricule, old_matricule)

index_analysis.name: idx_audit_worker
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_worker 
                ON matricule_audit_trail(worker_id)

index_analysis.name: idx_employer_matricule_lookup
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_employer_matricule_lookup 
                        ON matricule_name_resolver(employer_id, matricule, is_active)

index_analysis.name: idx_fast_matricule_lookup
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_fast_matricule_lookup 
                        ON matricule_name_resolver(matricule, is_active)

index_analysis.name: idx_matricule_prefix_search
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_matricule_prefix_search 
                        ON matricule_name_resolver(matricule COLLATE NOCASE)

index_analysis.name: idx_name_text_search
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_name_text_search 
                        ON matricule_name_resolver(full_name COLLATE NOCASE)

index_analysis.name: idx_resolver_assignment_join
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_resolver_assignment_join 
                        ON matricule_name_resolver(matricule, employer_id, is_active)

index_analysis.name: idx_resolver_employer_active
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_resolver_employer_active 
                ON matricule_name_resolver(employer_id, is_active)

index_analysis.name: idx_resolver_matricule
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_resolver_matricule 
                ON matricule_name_resolver(matricule)

index_analysis.name: idx_resolver_name
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_resolver_name 
                ON matricule_name_resolver(full_name, employer_id)

index_analysis.name: idx_resolver_search_vector
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_resolver_search_vector 
                ON matricule_name_resolver(search_vector)

index_analysis.name: idx_resolver_worker
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_resolver_worker 
                ON matricule_name_resolver(worker_id)

index_analysis.name: idx_org_unit_employer_level
index_analysis.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_org_unit_employer_level ON organizational_units (employer_id, level)

index_analysis.name: idx_org_unit_parent
index_analysis.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_org_unit_parent ON organizational_units (parent_id)

index_analysis.name: idx_org_assignment_audit
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_org_assignment_audit 
                        ON worker_organizational_assignments(created_at, updated_at)

index_analysis.name: idx_org_assignment_etablissement
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_org_assignment_etablissement 
                        ON worker_organizational_assignments(etablissement, is_active)
                        WHERE etablissement IS NOT NULL

index_analysis.name: idx_org_assignment_matricule_active
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_org_assignment_matricule_active 
                        ON worker_organizational_assignments(worker_matricule, is_active, effective_date)

index_analysis.name: idx_org_assignment_unit_active
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_org_assignment_unit_active 
                        ON worker_organizational_assignments(organizational_unit_id, is_active)

index_analysis.name: idx_worker_org_assignment_employer
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_worker_org_assignment_employer 
                ON worker_organizational_assignments(employer_id)

index_analysis.name: idx_worker_org_assignment_matricule
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_worker_org_assignment_matricule 
                ON worker_organizational_assignments(worker_matricule)

index_analysis.name: idx_worker_org_assignment_unique
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_worker_org_assignment_unique 
                ON worker_organizational_assignments(worker_matricule, employer_id, effective_date)
                WHERE is_active = 1

index_analysis.name: idx_worker_org_assignment_unit
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_worker_org_assignment_unit 
                ON worker_organizational_assignments(organizational_unit_id)

index_analysis.name: idx_workers_employer_matricule
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_workers_employer_matricule 
                ON workers(employer_id, matricule)

index_analysis.name: idx_workers_matricule_unique
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_workers_matricule_unique 
                    ON workers(matricule) 
                    WHERE matricule IS NOT NULL AND matricule != ''

index_analysis.name: idx_workers_resolver_join
index_analysis.sql:
CREATE INDEX idx_workers_resolver_join 
                        ON workers(matricule, employer_id)
                        WHERE matricule IS NOT NULL
